author: ymrohit
name: Hybrid Sparse Diffusion 2H 8xH100
blurb: Unlimited compute track: the v7 hybrid sparse diffusion model trained for 100k steps on 8xH100, reached a raw full-val score of 1.5992 BPB under the 16MB cap, and was still improving, but the available cloud budget ran out before a longer run and the full exact roundtrip re-eval could be completed.
